title: Executions Surge in Iran Since Cease-Fire, Rights Groups Say
summary_full: Many were detained during January’s mass protests, according to a rights group, amid concerns the authorities are trying to intimidate Iranians from returning to the streets.
summary_public: Many were detained during January’s mass protests, according to a rights group, amid concerns the authorities are trying to intimidate Iranians from returning to the streets.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Executions Surge in Iran Since Cease-Fire
